creator: ean@korax.net
text:
Using the sysinstall from FreeBSD 3.3 instead of the one in the 3.4
distribution doesn't experience the same problem and will install 3.4
distributions.  You only need to copy the /stand/sysinstall file.

-- 

Ean Kingston
Just another faceless name on the Internet.
URL: http://www.korax.net/~ean
